mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites (id, user_id, product_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
